description_long: This shotgun features a robust, angular black body with a prominent cylindrical barrel at the front, which appears to be metallic and slightly ribbed. The receiver section includes a rectangular ejection port and a series of vent-like cutouts along the side, suggesting a modern, tactical design. The grip is sharply angled and textured, resembling a pistol grip, and is attached to a boxy magazine well, indicating a detachable magazine system. The trigger is housed within a squared, elongated trigger guard, providing ample space for gloved fingers. The overall finish is matte black with metallic highlights on the barrel and ejection port, and subtle orange accents on the grip and magazine. The shotgun's design is compact and utilitarian, suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A compact, modern black shotgun with a metallic ribbed barrel, pistol grip, and boxy magazine, featuring a matte finish and tactical design elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow muzzle and cylindrical barrel, with the squared body and grip barely visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the shotgun, including the ribbed barrel, vented receiver, pistol grip, and boxy magazine.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the barrel and receiver, with the grip and magazine partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 1, with the vented receiver and grip details mirrored.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with visible ribbing at the muzzle
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, squared trigger guard with ample space and no visible finger grooves
